Package pl.pjatk.MATLOG.domain

Class User.Builder<T extends User.Builder<T>>

java.lang.Object
pl.pjatk.MATLOG.domain.User.Builder<T>
Type Parameters:
T - - concrete user builder
Direct Known Subclasses:
StudentUser.StudentUserBuilder, TutorUser.TutorBuilder
Enclosing class:
User
abstract static class User.Builder<T extends User.Builder<T>> extends Object
Abstract builder that have to be extended in concrete User class

  • Method Details

    • withFirstName

      public T withFirstName(String firstName)
      Method that sets User's first name
      Parameters:
      firstName - first name of the user
      Returns:
      Builder
      Throws:
      UserInvalidFirstNameException - when first name is null or blank

    • withLastName

      public T withLastName(String lastName)
      Method that sets User's last name
      Parameters:
      lastName - last name of the user
      Returns:
      Builder
      Throws:
      UserInvalidLastNameException - when last name is null or blank

    • withEmailAddress

      public T withEmailAddress(String emailAddress)
      Method that sets User's email address
      Parameters:
      emailAddress - email address of the user
      Returns:
      Builder
      Throws:
      UserInvalidEmailAddressException - when email address is null or blank

    • withPassword

      public T withPassword(String password)
      Method that sets User's password.
      Parameters:
      password - password of the user
      Returns:
      Builder
      Throws:
      UserEmptyPasswordException - when password is null or blank
      UserUnsecurePasswordException - when password doesn't have any capital letter nor special sign (33 - 64 in ASCII table) nor isn't at least 6 letters long

    • withDateOfBirth

      public T withDateOfBirth(LocalDate dateOfBirth)
      Method that sets User's date of birth
      Parameters:
      dateOfBirth - - date of birth of the user
      Returns:
      Builder
      Throws:
      UserInvalidDateOfBirthException - if date of birth is null or unreal ( x invalid input: '<'= 0 or 100 invalid input: '<' x)

    • withRole

      public T withRole(Role role)
      Method that sets User's role
      Parameters:
      role - role of the user
      Returns:
      Builder
      Throws:
      UserInvalidRoleException - when role is not provided or there is not such a role

    • self

      abstract T self()
      Method that needs to be implemented by concrete builder static class in the concrete User class. It must return builder class
      Returns:
      Builder

    • build

      protected abstract User build()
      Method that builds an objects with provided data and calls method that validates if all the required fields was provided
      Returns:
      User
